allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $body = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('{"text":"PARS sistemi tam kapasiteyle calisiyor."}'\); $req = [System.Net.WebRequest]::Create\("http://localhost:3737/tts"\); $req.Method = "POST"; $req.ContentType = "application/json; charset=utf-8"; $req.ContentLength = $body.Length; $req.Timeout = 60000; $s = $req.GetRequestStream\(\); $s.Write\($body,0,$body.Length\); $s.Close\(\); try { $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); $st=$resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $ms=New-Object System.IO.MemoryStream; $st.CopyTo\($ms\); $b=$ms.ToArray\(\); "ContentType: $\($resp.ContentType\) — $\($b.Length\) bytes" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $r=$_.Exception.Response; if\($r\){"HTTP $\([int]$r.StatusCode\)"}else{$_.Exception.Message} })
